text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While passing by the cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna bake the best desserts ever! ♪
Thank you both so much for agreeing to help!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Of course! ♪ I'll try my best to teach you
everything I know!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
My repertoire is nothing to sneeze at. Let's make
them big and buono! ♪
choice_data_list: You're baking desserts in the cafeteria?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we're gonna bake something for you as
thanks for all the hard work you do every day!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The chef gave us the okay to use the cafeteria
once we told her our idea. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Once you eat my delicious cake, your heart's
gonna—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: N-nothing! You can watch us bake if you want! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Now we mix the granulated sugar in...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: La la la... ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she's still new to baking, Mayano Top
Gun seems to be having a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she's still new to baking, Mayano Top
Gun seems to be having a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I offer a few words of encouragement as I watch
her work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...But they're covered up by the sound of my
rumbling stomach.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Haha! ♪ Hold on a second. We're almost done.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, we made some meringue cookies in our free
time earlier. Would you like one?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I gratefully accept one of Nishino Flower and
Hishi Akebono's cookies.
choice_data_list: Yum! These are just to my taste!
Yum! These are just to my taste!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: R-really? I'm glad you like it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No way!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ("Yum"? "Just to my taste"? ...I want Trainer to say that to me! )

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: (Looks like I've got no other choice...)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Flower! Bono! I'm gonna make the cake by myself!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Totally! No one knows what Trainer likes more
than I do!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(If I'm gonna fly higher than the two of them, I
have to make something incredible!)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun's finished cake has an...
indescribable structure and color.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it will be to your taste! I made it with your
favorite foods in mind!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And it's full of my love too... You'll eat it, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I brace myself and take a bite of Mayano Top
Gun's cake...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Is it really that good?! Is it actually to your taste?
choice_data_list: Yeah! I never doubted you, Mayano!
Yeah! I never doubted you, Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ♪ A successful landing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My words of praise leave Mayano Top Gun more
excited than I've ever seen her. She's still in very
high spirits as we finish our training afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell them that watching them bake makes me
want to give it a go myself.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, would you like to join us then? I can give you
a few pointers if you need any!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wait, wait! Trainer, you're supposed to be
watching me bake!
choice_data_list: But I want to thank you too, Mayano.
But I want to thank you too, Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that! ☆ In that case, prepare for bakeoff! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The more, the merrier. I'm sure the sweets will
come out even more buono now. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I manage to bake a cake, but it's a bit burnt...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wow! A cake from Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Gggh!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's kinda b-bitter, but grown-ups like bitter
things, right? ♪
choice_data_list: It's just burnt! You don't have to eat it!
It's just burnt! You don't have to eat it!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No way!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I won't let a single crumb of your feelings go to
waste! I'm gonna eat it all!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And that's why you're gonna try the cake I made.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Say "aaah"! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! Can you taste all the gratitude I put into
it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Mission accomplished. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Th-they're so close... My heart is going to beat
out of my chest if I keep watching!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And they both live buono-ly ever after! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the help of her two friends, Mayano Top
Gun's baking is a total success.
